models.name: density_exp_poly
models.description: Exponential-polynomial liquid density (no reference temperature): ln(rho) = ln(rho0) - A1*T - 0.5*A2*T^2. rho0, A1, A2 are free parameters; only observations are ln-transformed. Isobaric thermal expansivity alpha_p(T) = A2*T + A1.

models.name: density_exp_poly_t0
models.description: Exponential-polynomial liquid density with fixed reference temperature T0=313.15 K: ln(rho) = ln(rho0) - A1*(T-T0) - 0.5*A2*(T^2-T0^2). rho0 is the density at T0.

models.name: density_exp_poly_t0_mean_centered
models.description: Exponential-polynomial liquid density anchored at the group's mean temperature: T0 = mean(T), rho0 = rho(T0) by linear interpolation (fixed, not fitted). Only A1, A2 are inferred.

models.name: density_exp_poly_t0_anchored

metadata.anchor: To anchor the fit at a specific T0 (rather than the group mean), redefine this model with constants={'T0': <value>, 'rho0': {'kind': 'interp', 'feature': 'T', 'anchor': <value>}}.

models.description: Exponential-polynomial liquid density anchored at a chosen reference temperature. By default T0 = mean(T) and rho0 = rho(T0) (interpolated, fixed); only A1, A2 are inferred. Sweeping the anchor exposes how sensitive A1/A2 are to which point the curve is pinned through.

models.name: density_exp_poly_degC_anchored
models.description: Degree-Celsius-referenced exponential-polynomial density anchored at a chosen T0: ln(rho) = ln(rho0) - 0.5*A2*(T^2-T0^2) + (A1 - A2*273.15)*(T-T0). rho0 fixed (interpolated); only A1, A2 inferred.
